data.title: Fed’s Daly calls April PCE inflation a ‘relief,’ but says fight’s not over
data.description:
Mary Daly, who runs the San Francisco branch of the Fed, said on Friday that while the latest inflation figure brings some “relief” to Americans, the central bank isn’t done yet. The comment came during her appearance on Maria Bartiromo’s Wall Street on Fox Business, where she was talking about the 2. 1% rise in April’s […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/feds-daly-calls-april-pce-inflation-a-relief/

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: EIP-7702 new mechanism is widely used by coin theft gangs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: SlowMist Yuxian posted on the X platform that the "highest" use of the new mechanism EIP-7702 is actually by coin theft gangs (not phishing gangs), which facilitates the automatic transfer of relevant funds from the wallet address of the leaked private key/mnemonic phrase... More than 97% of EIP-7702 delegations are authorized to this type of coin theft contracts.

data.title: EIP-7702 Mechanism Exploited by Cryptocurrency Theft Groups
data.description: According to Odaily, SlowMist's Cosine shared on the X platform that the new EIP-7702 mechanism is being exploited by cryptocurrency theft groups, rather than phishing groups. This mechanism facilitates the automatic transfer of funds from wallet addresses with leaked private keys or mnemonic phrases. Over 97% of EIP-7702 delegations have been authorized to these theft contracts.

data.title: Planet Evening News
Stablecoin Market Cap Surpasses $250 Billion, USDT Leads
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coingecko reveals that the total market capitalization of stablecoins has exceeded $250 billion, with a 24-hour trading volume reaching $61.2 billion. USDT holds the top position with a market cap of over $153 billion, accounting for approximately 61.2% of the market. USDC follows in second place with a market cap exceeding $61 billion.

data.title: OrcaMind.ai, an on-chain trading AI Agent platform, launches Chat function and opens whitelist experience
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OrcaMind.ai, an AI Agent platform for on-chain transactions, has officially launched the Chat dialogue function and is the first to open Arbitrum MCP Server for users. Users can now use OrcaMind Chat to complete multiple operations such as transfers, inquiries, and pledges on the Arb network with just one command (such as "Send ETH on Arbitrum"), truly opening up the experience of "one sentence to complete on-chain operations".
In the future, the platform will also continue to support many MCP Servers such as Ethereum, BSC, Uniswap, Pump.fun, PancakeSwap, etc., and continue to expand the boundaries of intelligent execution.
Based on the innovative Web MCP architecture, OrcaMind.ai supports developers to independently deploy MCP Servers through standard SDKs, and call AI assistants for on-chain execution through a unified interface. Official whitelist registration is now open, and successfully selected users can participate in the internal test first, and receive early points rewards and exclusive incentives.

data.title: The total market value of stablecoins exceeded 250 billion US dollars, and USDT accounted for about 61.2%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coingecko data shows that the total market value of stablecoins has exceeded 250 billion US dollars, currently reaching 250,024,816,027 US dollars, a 24-hour increase of 0.1%, and a 24-hour trading volume of 61,231,269,308 US dollars. Among them, Tether (USDT) has a market value of more than 153 billion US dollars, accounting for about 61.2%, ranking first; USDC has a market value of more than 61 billion US dollars, ranking second.

data.title: FTX creditor representative: Kraken has issued a fund distribution notice to creditor customers
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Sunil, a representative of FTX creditors, posted on the X platform that Kraken has issued a fund distribution notice to FTX creditor customers. The fund distribution time for FTX US creditors is May 30, 2025 (total claims: US$312 million), and the fund distribution time for FTX international creditors is June 2, 2025.
Earlier news, FTX has announced the launch of the second phase of user repayment procedures, and it is expected to distribute more than US$5 billion to creditors, who will receive the funds within 1 to 3 working days.

data.title: A whale deposited 605 ETH worth $1.53 million to Kraken 1 hour ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, "OG of 100,000 ETH in IC0 in 2015" recharged 605 ETH to Kraken an hour ago, worth $1.53 million, with a cost as low as $0.31. In the past ten days, he has sold a total of 4,003 ETH, with a total value of $10.4 million, an average recharge price of $2,598, and currently still has 24,998 ETH left.

data.title: IMF Questions Pakistan's Bitcoin Mining Power Allocation Amid Energy Concerns
data.description:
According to Odaily, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) has raised concerns over Pakistan's recent decision to allocate 2,000 megawatts of electricity for Bitcoin mining. This plan, announced last week, aims to attract independent miners, blockchain companies, and artificial intelligence firms to the country. The IMF has requested urgent clarification from Pakistan's Ministry of Finance regarding the legality of cryptocurrency mining and the allocation of power, especially given the nation's ongoing energy shortages and financial pressures.

The Pakistani government reportedly did not consult the IMF before making this announcement. Additionally, the IMF has expressed worries about the potential impact of cryptocurrency activities on Pakistan's electricity prices and resource distribution. It is anticipated that both parties will arrange a separate meeting to specifically discuss the Bitcoin power allocation plan.

data.title: Bitcoin's Future and Adoption by Major U.S. Banks Discussed by Lightspark CEO
data.description: According to Foresight News, Lightspark co-founder and CEO David Marcus discussed key topics related to the Bitcoin 2025 conference in an interview with CNBC. He highlighted Bitcoin's evolution into a form of digital gold and noted the impending adoption of Bitcoin by several major U.S. banks. Marcus also touched on the involvement of the Trump family in the cryptocurrency sector, emphasizing the growing significance of Bitcoin in the financial landscape.
